sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Pure combinational 3x3 Sobel gradient stencil producing signed X and Y gradients.
sub_modules.harris_grad_products: Pure combinational pointwise gradient product unit computing Ix squared, Iy squared, and IxIy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Pure combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing stencil with weights 1-2-1 / 2-4-2 / 1-2-1 normalized by 16.
sub_modules.harris_response: Pure combinational Harris response arithmetic computing det(M) minus fixed-point k times trace(M)^2 with saturation to response width.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Pure combinational threshold decision logic generating the binary corner flag.
